message:
test(core,membrane): add allocator and membrane property tests with configurable case counts

Add generative proptest coverage for allocator size-class invariants (bin_index
rounding, LargeAllocator alignment/accounting) in property_tests.rs, and add
dynamic membrane properties (`allocated_pointer_property_validates_as_live`,
`freed_pointer_property_becomes_temporal_violation`) in ptr_validator.rs.

Introduce `property_proptest_config` in both modules to allow case counts to be
overridden at runtime via FRANKENLIBC_PROPTEST_CASES for CI tuning, and bump
default cases from 128 to 256.

Bead: bd-2tq.3

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
